name: Felix Slatkin
abstract: Felix Slatkin (December 22, 1915 – February 8, 1963) was an American violinist and conductor.

about_quotes.speaker: Sam Most
about_quotes.evidence: I had a flute solo to do with Felix Slatkin or one of the early things with one of the studios.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sam Most interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
